summary: First iteration end-to-end testing of Kurate.org homepage. Backend: 12/12 pytest tests passed covering /api/categories, /api/years, /api/metrics, /api/papers (filters: category, year, period, search 'quantum', rank_type top/agreement/validation), /api/recent (8 cards + recent_papers), /api/activity. Frontend: home page renders all panels, all data-testid interactive elements present, hero search/chips filter leaderboard live, FAQ accordion expands, /leaderboard route reads URL params (category=cs.AI&q=reasoning -> 2 results, search pre-filled). Clean white academic design verified visually.

issues: Link always uses raw current state which includes default values (category=all&year=all&period=all&rank_type=top&q=) - works as expected for filter preservation but URL is verbose even when no filters selected.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') - should migrate to lifespan context manager (FastAPI deprecation).

seed.py rebuilds with random seed=20260201 on every backend restart, but timestamps are computed from datetime.now(), so 'latest_update' shifts on each boot - acceptable for demo but document this behavior.
/api/metrics returns empty dict {} if PAPERS empty; should return 503 or default structure to avoid frontend crashes during startup race.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created; backend seeds 120 papers (12 categories x 10) on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend uses in-memory PAPERS list populated on FastAPI startup (build_papers from seed.py). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_kurate_api.py covers all 7 endpoints with 12 tests. Frontend testids: search-input, filter-category, filter-year, filter-period, filter-rank-type, chip-{code}, leaderboard-table, view-full-leaderboard-link, faq-trigger-{i}, lb-search/lb-category/lb-year/lb-period/lb-rank/lb-table on /leaderboard page. Note: there is NO section-level data-testid like 'hero-panel' or 'faq-section'; sections are identified via inner element testids.
